title: SWD EaGirls top of first division log
description: GEORGE NEWS - The SWD EaGirls are currently...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The SWD EaGirls are currently top of the log as they campaign in the women's first division. They won their two first matches to secure 10 points on the log. The first match on 15 June was against the Falcons, whom they convincingly beat 41-24. On 22 June they dominated the Leopards by winning 31-14. Their next match will be on 6 July when they take on the Griffons in Welkom.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
